ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the market indicator (e.g., stock price, exchange rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Primary data source for this indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the indicator was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., UK, EU, France, Italy, US) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the region information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market indicator */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the market indicator */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data value */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Data quality score (1-10) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data point was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES market_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., API, CSV file, manual upload) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV, manual) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last date and time the source was checked for updates */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_upload_history" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date of the data upload */,
  "upload_status" TEXT /* Status of the data upload (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file uploaded (if applicable) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file uploaded (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the upload */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Data quality score (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_upload_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_upload_history_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the dashboard was updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the dashboard is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the chart belongs to */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., line, bar, pie) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the chart was updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the chart is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_data" (
  "chart_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart data point */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data value */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Data quality score (1-10) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data point was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_data_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market indicator */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the alert is active or inactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES market_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_history" (
  "alert_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert trigger */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message or description of the alert trigger */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was notified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, Excel, HTML) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the report is public or private */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
